comment.body:
Is the reversion model still with this values or something else have changed? 

The reversion probability is at 92.14%, very rare signal and very high!

Be mindful of it and size accordingly!

comment.body: The line at Thur. high is my notation for a conformed 1 wave of the 5 wave pattern i'm always on the lookout for.  Ideally, we will get a sharp down move, not necessarily big in points, that would conform to wave 2 down.  then it would be 3 up new high, 4 down, conformed 5 marks the end of the move.
